form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 320m at this track behind Missy's Girl beaten 7 lengths (18.85). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 320m at this track behind Missy's Girl beaten 7 lengths (18.85). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together shortly after the start and stumbled, losing momentum.
Came together entering the back straight.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 401m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 401m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the start came up with the lids and was slow to begin.
Began to yield ground at the 150m mark.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd over 320m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (18.52) behind Lizzy Bonkers in a Grade 5 on April 12. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 2nd over 320m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (18.52) behind Lizzy Bonkers in a Grade 5 on April 12. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Nowra, the latest when beaten 7 lengths behind Donna Don't Stop over 365m. This looks too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Nowra, the latest when beaten 7 lengths behind Donna Don't Stop over 365m. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Steps up to 401m for the first time. Last appeared when eighth over 318m at Dubbo six weeks ago. Draw will be an advantage capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Steps up to 401m for the first time. Last appeared when eighth over 318m at Dubbo six weeks ago. Draw will be an advantage capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (23.02) over 401m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (23.02) over 401m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, racing well and has to be included.

formComments.comment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Nearing the exit to the back straight came together.
